channel.title: api on Fundor333
channel.description: Recent content in api on Fundor333

item.title: Building My Backend
item.description: More time pass more time I need a server for my cronjob and other process. Sometime the cron was a supid thing, working only for the short period and after can be trashed but the real problem start with Feedly, the subscription for feed I use. One day, adding a new feed to my Feedly account, I discovered that I can’t add more in the free subscription. So I start thinking some alternative.

item.title: Django Rest Framework: Multiple post
item.description: I need to have a massive put in my rest endpoint and Django Rest Framework doesn’t do it. So I make my personal method for mycase. Setup fo the project You need to follow the tutorial from the official documentation of Django Rest Framework. After this you have a MyModel, MyModelSerializer and a view class MyModelListPost. Why I can’t use the default? After you did the tutorial you have a base for a standard Django Rest Framework.

item.title: GraphQL and working with it
item.description: What is a REST API? REST stand for Representational state transfer (REST) or RESTful web services and it’s the most used tipe of API you find online. If I need some data I need to go to the url of the API and go to the subpath of the data I want. For example if I need some posts from _https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/_ I need to go to _https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts_ and download all the posts or pass the id in the url like in _https://jsonplaceholder.
